name: Sugar Springs Activity Center
about: Sugar Springs Activity Center is a multi-faceted recreational community located in north central Michigan. The venue operates as a Property Owners Association (POA) and features a golf course with indoor simulator capabilities, utilizing Trackman technology for year-round practice. While specific pricing is not detailed, the community offers various recreational amenities, including dining, fitness, and events, suggesting a comprehensive lifestyle-focused environment. The facility caters to residents and guests looking for both on-course play and indoor golf simulation.
why_golfers_like_it: Trackman Full Swing Indoor Golf Simulator for year-round practice regardless of weather
Golf course rated three stars by Golf Digest and listed as one of the 25 Best Public Courses in Michigan
The Hearth restaurant offers on-site dining for a complete social and golfing experience

food_and_drink.notes: The Hearth restaurant offers a wide variety of offerings from wings to pizza to burgers to steak to fish and chips
The Hearth restaurant provides a casual dining experience with drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: Full Swing Indoor Golf Simulator available for winter practice and fun

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site restaurant, The Hearth, which offers food and drinks. BYOB policy is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for playing 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Sugar Springs offers events like an Easter Egg Hunt and Pool Party, and describes itself as a family-oriented recreational community.
